subcodes.first_line: O friends of Truth! It is the afternoon hour, and the sun's radiance is diminishing; yet the Sun of Reality, from the unseen Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حق وقت عصر است و آفتاب پرتوش در تناقص ولی شمس حقیقت از غیب ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power of the Manifestation of God
